betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The §6Biome Changer Remote§f is a §6single block§f utility item used to change a §632×32 area§f of terrain from one biome to another. It is the §6terraforming tool§f of the AR progression — the only way to convert alien biomes (toxic, frozen, volcanic) into §6breathable§f, §6farmable§f terrain. The remote is paired with a §6Biome Scanner§f (10064) to know the current biome.

§6Production Path (biomechangerremote.json)§f:
- Machine: §6Precision Assembler§f (10012) at 1000 ticks
- Input: 1x §6libvulpes:battery:0§f, 1x §6Advanced Circuit§f (advancedrocketry:ic:2), 1x §6User Interface§f (advancedrocketry:misc:0), 1x §6Tracking Circuit§f (advancedrocketry:ic:1), 1x §6plateTin§f (forge:ore_dict)
- Output: 1x §6Biome Changer Remote§f (advancedrocketry:biomechanger)
- Energy: 1 RF/t
- Power: 100 RF/t during operation
- Companion: §6Biome Changer Satellite Primary Function§f (biomechanger.json) is the satellite counterpart, crafted at 1000 ticks from §6stickCopper × 2§f, §6stickTitanium§f, §6Advanced Circuit§f, 2x §6Silicon Wafer§f

The remote's GUI shows a §632×32 grid§f of the target area, with each cell color-coded to the current biome. The player selects a target biome and clicks "Convert" — the remote consumes §6RF power§f and §6liquid oxygen§f to perform the change. The process takes §660 seconds§f for a 32×32 area.

The biome changer remote is a prerequisite for the §6Atmosphere Terraformer§f (10070) and the §6Planetary Terraforming§f questline. It is also used by the §6Biome Changer Satellite§f (10043) to perform automated biome changes from orbit.

§eTip§f: For large terraforming projects, use a §6Biome Changer Satellite§f in orbit — the satellite can change a §62048×2048§f area per pass, vs. the remote's 32×32 limit. The remote is best for §6small-scale corrections§f after a satellite sweep.
